sources.title: 女誡

sources.citation_en: Ban Zhao, Admonitions for Women (Nüjie), Wikisource digital text.

sources.title: 潛夫論

sources.citation_en: Wang Fu, Discourses of a Recluse (Qianfu lun), Sibu congkan facsimile, Chinese Text Project.

sources.title: 禮記鄭氏注·禮器
sources.citation_zh: 鄭玄注：《禮記鄭氏注》卷十〈禮器〉，《四部叢刊》景宋刊本影像。
sources.citation_en: Zheng Xuan, Commentary on the Book of Rites, juan 10, “Ritual Vessels,” facsimile of a Song edition in Sibu congkan.

sources.title: 大人先生傳
sources.citation_zh: 阮籍：《大人先生傳》，維基文庫校錄本。
sources.citation_en: Ruan Ji, Biography of Master Great Man, Wikisource digital text.

sources.title: 難嵇叔夜養生論

sources.citation_en: Xiang Xiu, “Objections to Ji Shuye's Discourse on Nourishing Life,” digital transcription from the received literary collection.

sources.title: 晉書·裴頠傳所載崇有論
sources.citation_zh: 房玄齡等：《晉書》卷三十五〈裴頠傳〉所載〈崇有論〉，中國哲學書電子化計劃。
sources.citation_en: Book of Jin, juan 35, “Biography of Pei Wei,” preserving Pei's Discourse on Valuing Being, Chinese Text Project.

sources.title: 抱朴子內篇
sources.citation_zh: 葛洪：《抱朴子內篇》，中國哲學書電子化計劃。
sources.citation_en: Ge Hong, Inner Chapters of the Master Who Embraces Simplicity, Chinese Text Project digital edition.

sources.title: 世說新語·文學劉孝標注引支遁《逍遙論》
sources.citation_zh: 支遁〈逍遙論〉佚文，見劉孝標《世說新語·文學》注；校引參劉梁劍〈《逍遙遊》向郭義與支遁義勘會〉，《華東師範大學學報（哲學社會科學版）》2010年第3期。
sources.citation_en: Fragment of Zhi Dun's lost Discourse on Free Wandering, quoted in Liu Xiaobiao's commentary to A New Account of the Tales of the World; checked against Liu Liangjian, ECNU Journal, 2010.3.

sources.title: 沙門不敬王者論
sources.citation_zh: 慧遠：《沙門不敬王者論》，僧祐《弘明集》卷五，《大正新脩大藏經》第52冊第2102號，CBETA。
sources.citation_en: Huiyuan, “On Why Monastics Do Not Bow to Rulers,” in Sengyou's Hongming ji, juan 5, Taishō 52, no. 2102, CBETA.

sources.title: 梁書·范縝傳所載神滅論
sources.citation_zh: 姚思廉：《梁書》卷四十八〈范縝傳〉所載〈神滅論〉，《四庫全書》本數字影像。
sources.citation_en: Yao Silian, Book of Liang, juan 48, “Biography of Fan Zhen,” preserving the Treatise on the Extinction of Spirit, Siku quanshu digital facsimile.

sources.title: 二諦義
sources.citation_zh: 吉藏：《二諦義》卷一，《大正新脩大藏經》第45冊第1854號，CBETA。
sources.citation_en: Jizang, Meaning of the Two Truths, juan 1, Taishō 45, no. 1854, CBETA.

sources.title: 華嚴法界觀門（澄觀《華嚴法界玄鏡》所存）
sources.citation_zh: 傳杜順撰，澄觀述：《華嚴法界玄鏡》所存〈華嚴法界觀門〉，《大正新脩大藏經》第45冊第1883號，CBETA。
sources.citation_en: Attributed to Dushun, Gate of Contemplating the Huayan Dharma Realm, preserved in Chengguan's Huayan fajie xuanjing, Taishō 45, no. 1883, CBETA.

sources.title: 因明入正理論疏所傳玄奘真唯識量
sources.citation_zh: 窺基：《因明入正理論疏》卷上所傳玄奘“真唯識量”，《大正新脩大藏經》第44冊第1840號，CBETA。
sources.citation_en: Kuiji, Commentary on the Nyāyapraveśa, juan 1, transmitting Xuanzang's “Inference of Consciousness-Only,” Taishō 44, no. 1840, CBETA.

sources.title: 荊州玉泉寺大通禪師碑銘並序
sources.citation_zh: 張說：〈荊州玉泉寺大通禪師碑銘並序〉，《唐文粹》卷六十三，《四部叢刊》本影像。
sources.citation_en: Zhang Yue, “Stele Inscription with Preface for Chan Master Datong of Yuquan Monastery,” Tang wen cui, juan 63, Sibu congkan facsimile.

sources.title: 成唯識論述記
sources.citation_zh: 窺基：《成唯識論述記》卷一，《大正新脩大藏經》第43冊第1830號，臺大佛學數位圖書館電子版。
sources.citation_en: Kuiji, Detailed Commentary on the Cheng weishi lun, juan 1, Taishō 43, no. 1830, NTU Digital Library of Buddhist Studies.

sources.title: 顯宗記
sources.citation_zh: 傳神會撰：〈顯宗記〉，後收《景德傳燈錄》卷三十，維基文庫校錄本。
sources.citation_en: Attributed to Shenhui, “Record Manifesting the Lineage,” later included in the Jingde Record of the Transmission of the Lamp, juan 30, Wikisource digital text.

sources.title: 景德傳燈錄·江西道一禪師
sources.citation_zh: 道原編：《景德傳燈錄》卷六〈江西道一禪師〉，《大正新脩大藏經》第51冊第2076號，CBETA。
sources.citation_en: Daoyuan, comp., Jingde Record of the Transmission of the Lamp, juan 6, “Chan Master Daoyi of Jiangxi,” Taishō 51, no. 2076, CBETA.

sources.title: 原道
sources.citation_zh: 韓愈：〈原道〉，《韓昌黎文集》，維基文庫校錄本。
sources.citation_en: Han Yu, “An Inquiry into the Way,” Collected Writings of Han Changli, Wikisource digital text.

sources.title: 復性書
sources.citation_zh: 李翱：《復性書》上篇，中國孔子網典籍條目據傳世《李文公集》校錄。
sources.citation_en: Li Ao, Book of Returning to One's Nature, part 1, transcription from the received Li Wengong ji, China Confucius Foundation.

sources.title: 封建論
sources.citation_zh: 柳宗元：〈封建論〉，《柳河東集》，維基文庫校錄本。
sources.citation_en: Liu Zongyuan, “Discourse on Enfeoffment,” Collected Works of Liu Hedong, Wikisource digital text.

claims.text_zh: 既然夫妇共同构成人伦秩序，只教育男子而不教育女子就是对这一秩序的片面理解；女子同样需要系统学习礼义。
claims.text_en: Because husband and wife jointly constitute the human ethical order, educating boys while leaving girls untaught is a one-sided understanding of that order; women likewise require systematic education in ritual and right conduct.
claims.explanation_zh: 《女诫》整体维护等级化的夫妇伦理，但班昭也明确以夫妇关系的重要性论证女性教育的必要，不能把这条命题改写成现代平等主义。
claims.explanation_en: Admonitions for Women maintains a hierarchical marital ethic, yet Ban Zhao explicitly uses the importance of marriage to argue that women must be educated. The claim should not be anachronistically recast as modern egalitarianism.
claims.locator: 〈夫婦第二〉末段
claims.excerpt_text: 夫婦之道，參配陰陽，通達神明，信天地之弘義，人倫之大節也……但教男而不教女，不亦蔽於彼此之數乎？
claims.attribution_note: 《女诫》传统一直归班昭；现存文本经过长期抄刻。该命题同时保留其倡导女教与维护性别等级的历史张力。

claims.text_zh: 国家以人民为根本，人民以粮食维持生命；政务若不断侵夺农时，便会同时摧毁民生与国家的根基。
claims.text_en: A state is grounded in its people, and the people's lives depend on grain; when government repeatedly takes away the farming season, it damages both livelihood and the foundation of the state.
claims.explanation_zh: 王符把国家、人民、粮食和农时串成一条政治因果链，用来批评徭役和行政活动轻率占用生产时间。
claims.explanation_en: Wang Fu links state, people, grain, and agricultural time in a political causal chain, criticizing corvée and administrative demands that recklessly consume the productive season.
claims.locator: 卷五〈愛日第十八〉开篇
claims.excerpt_text: 國之所以為國者，以有民也；民之所以為民者，以有穀也。穀之所以豐殖者，以有人功也；功之所以能建者，以日力也。
claims.attribution_note: 采用《潜夫论》传世本；命题限于〈爱日〉可直接支持的民生—农时论证。

claims.text_zh: 礼如同人的身体结构：只有各项礼节相互配合而完备，人才能成为伦理意义上完整的人。
claims.text_en: Ritual is analogous to the structure of a body: only when its practices are coordinated and complete does a person become fully formed in the ethical sense.
claims.explanation_zh: 郑玄以“体”训“礼”，不是把礼缩减为外在礼貌，而是把礼理解为组织行动、身份与德性的整体形式。
claims.explanation_en: By glossing ritual through the body, Zheng Xuan does not reduce li to etiquette; he treats it as an integrated form organizing action, status, and virtue.
claims.locator: 《禮記鄭氏注》卷十〈禮器第十〉，“禮也者猶體也”章郑注
claims.excerpt_text: 禮也者，猶體也。體不備，君子謂之不成人。
claims.attribution_note: 经文与注文须分层：此句见《礼记·礼器》传本文本，郑玄注文以身体结构阐释“礼”。公开时归作“郑玄对礼的解释”，不称其原创经句。

claims.text_zh: 最高的人格不以世俗名分、功名和礼法束缚自身，而与天地同体、随自然变化，在不役于外物中获得自由。
claims.text_en: The highest person is not confined by conventional ranks, reputation, or ritual codes, but shares one body with heaven and earth, follows spontaneous transformation, and is free by not being enslaved to external things.
claims.explanation_zh: 阮籍借“大人先生”批判把周孔名教变成求名与自保工具的君子，以自然、无执和超越固定身份构造理想人格。
claims.explanation_en: Through Master Great Man, Ruan Ji criticizes gentlemen who turn Confucian ritual into tools of reputation and self-preservation, constructing an ideal person through spontaneity, nonattachment, and freedom from fixed identity.
claims.locator: 《大人先生傳》开篇及答君子书段
claims.excerpt_text: 夫大人者，乃與造物同體，天地並生，逍遙浮世，與道俱成……養性延壽，與自然齊光。
claims.attribution_note: 命题归于阮籍塑造的“大人先生”理想人格，不把作品中的君子来书等反方话语误归作者。

claims.text_zh: 人的情欲、亲爱和感官需要属于生命的自然结构，不应一概断绝；合理的养生是在承认它们的同时用礼义加以节制。
claims.text_en: Affection, desire, and sensory needs belong to the natural structure of human life and should not be abolished wholesale; proper self-cultivation acknowledges them while regulating them through ritual and rightness.
claims.explanation_zh: 向秀反对嵇康把寡情绝欲推到极端，试图把“自然”与“名教”接合：欲望有其正当位置，但不等于放纵。
claims.explanation_en: Xiang Xiu resists Ji Kang's radical reduction of desire and joins spontaneity to normative ritual: desires have a legitimate place, but that does not license indulgence.
claims.locator: 〈難嵇叔夜養生論〉中段“生之為樂”段
claims.excerpt_text: 且生之為樂，以恩愛相接，天理人倫，燕婉娛心，榮華悅志，服食滋味，以宣五情；納御聲色，以達性氣，此天理之自然，人之所宜、三王所不易也。
claims.attribution_note: 现存文本见嵇康文集系统及后代总集。该句是向秀对嵇康的诘难；规范命题补入其同篇“以礼节之”的限制，避免误读为纵欲论。

claims.text_zh: 绝对的“无”没有生成能力，最初出现的存在者只能自生；具体制度与事物因此不能被贬为空无的附属，而是秩序与功用的现实基础。
claims.text_en: Absolute nonbeing has no generative capacity, so the first beings must arise of themselves; concrete institutions and things are therefore not dispensable appendages of nothingness but the real bases of order and function.
claims.explanation_zh: 裴頠以“崇有”反驳贵无论的社会后果：若把礼法制度都消解为末迹，就无法解释现实秩序如何成立。
claims.explanation_en: Pei Wei's valuing of being attacks the social implications of prioritizing nonbeing: dissolving rites and institutions into secondary traces leaves the formation of actual order unexplained.
claims.locator: 《晉書》卷三十五〈裴頠傳〉引〈崇有論〉“至无者无以能生”段
claims.excerpt_text: 夫至無者，無以能生，故始生者自生也。自生而必體有，則有遺而生虧矣。
claims.attribution_note: 《崇有论》全篇主要靠《晋书·裴頠传》保存；命题按史书所录残篇归于裴頠，不假定已经见到独立原刊本。

claims.text_zh: 成仙虽极其困难，却不是天生固定的身份；通过传授、药物、守一和累积实践，凡人原则上能够学习并达到长生。
claims.text_en: Immortality is extraordinarily difficult but not a fixed inborn status; through transmission, medicines, meditative unity, and accumulated practice, ordinary people can in principle learn to attain longevity.
claims.explanation_zh: 葛洪反复以可学习的技艺类比仙道，反对“仙有种属、不可学得”的宿命论，同时强调方法、资质、师授与物质条件。
claims.explanation_en: Ge Hong repeatedly compares the Way of immortality to learnable arts, opposing the fatalism that immortals form an innate species, while stressing method, aptitude, teachers, and material conditions.
claims.locator: 《抱朴子內篇》卷二〈論仙〉、卷三〈對俗〉辨“仙人有種”段
claims.excerpt_text: 夫求長生，修至道，訣在於志，不在於富貴也……仙人有種乎？然，何可學得乎？
claims.attribution_note: 引文后半是对方质问，葛洪在随后答辩中否定“仙人有种”。规范命题依据整段论证，不把问者反论当作者结论。

claims.text_zh: 逍遥不是任何事物各自满足欲性，而是至人驾驭万物却不被万物役使，使外物不能取得并束缚其心。
claims.text_en: Free wandering is not each creature merely satisfying its own inclinations; it is the perfected person's ability to engage things without being enslaved by them, so that objects cannot seize and bind the mind.
claims.explanation_zh: 支遁以“至足”修正向郭的“适性逍遥”：若只要适性，桀纣也可称逍遥；真正自由必须含有不为物累的价值超越。
claims.explanation_en: Zhi Dun's perfected sufficiency revises the Xiang-Guo idea of freedom through fitting one's nature: otherwise tyrants too would count as free. Genuine freedom requires evaluative transcendence of enslavement to things.
claims.locator: 《世說新語·文學》第32则刘孝标注引支氏〈逍遙論〉佚文
claims.excerpt_text: 夫逍遙者，明至人之心也……物物而不物於物，則遙然不我得；玄感不為，不疾而速，則逍然靡不適。
claims.attribution_note: 《逍遥论》已佚，现段由南朝刘孝标《世说新语注》转引；只能按明确引文归于支遁，篇章全貌不可复原。

claims.text_zh: 出家者以超越生死和世俗秩序为志，属于“方外之宾”；因此可以不履行臣民向君王跪拜的同一礼制，同时仍以教化和德行利益社会。
claims.text_en: Renunciants seek transcendence of life-and-death and worldly order and are guests beyond the realm; they may therefore decline the same prostration owed by subjects to rulers while still benefiting society through teaching and virtue.
claims.explanation_zh: 慧远区分在家信众与出家沙门，在不否定王权秩序的前提下为僧团争取仪礼自治，并以社会教化效果说明其不等于不敬。
claims.explanation_en: Huiyuan distinguishes lay Buddhists from monastics, securing ritual autonomy for the saṅgha without simply denying political order, and argues that social benefit prevents non-prostration from amounting to disrespect.
tags_en: monastics do not bow to rulers
claims.locator: T52, no. 2102, 卷5〈沙門不敬王者論·出家第二〉
claims.excerpt_text: 出家則是方外之賓，迹絕於物……是故凡在出家，皆遁世以求其志，變俗以達其道。
claims.attribution_note: 文章收于僧祐《弘明集》，作者归属明确；规范命题并列其礼仪自治与助王化两面，避免只截取为现代政教分离论。

claims.text_zh: 精神不是独立于形体的实体，而是有生命形体的作用；如同锋利不能脱离刀刃，形体消亡后精神也不可能继续存在。
claims.text_en: Spirit is not a substance independent of the body but the functioning of a living body; just as sharpness cannot survive apart from a blade, consciousness cannot remain after the body's dissolution.
claims.explanation_zh: 范缜以“形质神用”和刀刃之喻论证形神一体，直接反驳灵魂可离身延续及由此建立的报应说。
claims.explanation_en: Fan Zhen's body-as-substance and spirit-as-function thesis, illustrated by blade and sharpness, argues for psycho-physical unity against survival of a disembodied soul and its karmic consequences.
claims.locator: 《梁書》卷四十八〈儒林·范縝傳〉所载〈神滅論〉开篇问答
claims.excerpt_text: 形者神之質，神者形之用……神之於質，猶利之於刃；形之於用，猶刃之於利……豈容形亡而神在？
claims.attribution_note: 《神灭论》由《梁书·范缜传》和《弘明集》相关论辩保存，文字有小异；此处采用两系共有的核心段。

claims.text_zh: 真谛与俗谛首先是佛陀因应众生而使用的两种言教，不是两个固定存在的境界；执著任何一谛为实体都会失去二谛的破执功能。
claims.text_en: The ultimate and conventional truths are first of all two modes of teaching employed for sentient beings, not two fixed ontological realms; reifying either truth defeats their function of undoing attachment.
claims.explanation_zh: 吉藏把二谛界定为“言教”和“相待假称”，用以层层破除有、无、非有非无等执著，而不是建立一个新的二元本体论。
claims.explanation_en: Jizang defines the two truths as verbal teaching and mutually dependent provisional names, used to dismantle attachments to being, nonbeing, and their alternatives rather than establish a new dualist ontology.
claims.locator: T45, no. 1854, 卷1〈釋名第一〉开篇
claims.excerpt_text: 二諦者，蓋是言教之通詮，相待之假稱。
claims.attribution_note: 《二谛义》为吉藏讲述系统的现存著作。规范命题遵循其“二谛是教”立场，不把后世概括当作原句。

claims.text_zh: 色并非先存在而后被消灭为空；色当体无自性，所以即空，而真空也只能在不碍色相显现中被理解。
claims.text_en: Form is not first existent and later annihilated into emptiness; because form is intrinsically without self-nature it is emptiness, and true emptiness is understood only as nonobstructive of appearing form.
claims.explanation_zh: “真空观”同时排除实色和断空，把空色不二作为进入理事无碍法界的第一重观门。
claims.explanation_en: The contemplation of true emptiness rejects both substantial form and annihilating voidness, treating the nonduality of emptiness and form as the first gate into the nonobstructed dharma realm.
claims.locator: T45, no. 1883, p. 672a-b，〈真空觀第一·會色歸空觀〉
claims.excerpt_text: 色即是空。何以故？色不即斷空故，色舉體是真空故。
claims.attribution_note: 《法界观门》不见杜顺同时代独立本，主要嵌存于较晚的澄观《华严法界玄镜》；现代研究对杜顺作者身份有争论，故仅作“传统归于杜顺”的观点。

claims.text_zh: 在胜义分析中，共同承认的可见色境不离眼识；这不是否认经验现象，而是反驳色境作为心外独立实体的成立。
claims.text_en: Under ultimate analysis, commonly accepted visible form is not separate from visual consciousness; this does not deny empirical appearance but rejects visible objects as independently established outside cognition.
claims.explanation_zh: “真唯识量”用因明三支论证唯识立场，并以“真故”“极成”等限定避开自宗不许或敌方不许的命题。
claims.explanation_en: The inference of consciousness-only uses the three-membered Buddhist syllogism and qualifiers such as “ultimately” and “commonly accepted” to avoid premises denied by either disputant.
claims.locator: T44, no. 1840, 卷上，疏释“真故极成色”量式段
claims.excerpt_text: 真故極成色，定不離眼識；自許初三攝，眼所不攝故，猶如眼識。
claims.attribution_note: 量式相传为玄奘在曲女城所立，现存文字由弟子窥基等后来的因明注疏保存，并非玄奘亲笔独立著作；据此标注为“后世弟子传录的口头论式”。

claims.text_zh: 禅修的核心在专注意念以止息分别想，并尽力收摄散乱心；由内在摄心进入觉悟，不应只依外在仪式。
claims.text_en: Chan practice centers on concentrated recollection that quiets conceptual thought and forcefully gathers the scattered mind; awakening is entered through this inward collection rather than external ritual alone.
claims.explanation_zh: 这是张说为神秀所作碑铭对其开法大略的概括，较晚出的“时时勤拂拭”故事更接近神秀身后不久的历史见证。
claims.explanation_en: This is Zhang Yue's near-contemporary summary of Shenxiu's method and is historically closer to him than the later story of the “constantly polish it” verse.
claims.locator: 《唐文粹》卷六十三〈荊州玉泉寺大通禪師碑銘並序〉“开法大略”段
claims.excerpt_text: 其開法大略，則專念以息想，極力以攝心。其入也品均凡聖，其到也行無前後。
claims.work_title: 荊州玉泉寺大通禪師碑銘並序
claims.attribution_note: 引文是张说对神秀教法的身后碑传概述，不是神秀第一人称原话。为避免后出南宗叙事污染，未采用《坛经》壁偈作为直接证据。

claims.text_zh: “唯识”只遮遣心外境的实有性，并不把识本身也判为空无；它既反对外境实体论，也反对一切皆无的虚无论。
claims.text_en: “Consciousness-only” excludes the substantial existence of objects outside cognition without declaring consciousness itself nonexistent; it rejects both external-object realism and nihilism.
claims.explanation_zh: 窥基用“唯遮境有，识简心空”解释“唯识”二字的双重边界，使唯识论保持非有非空的中道。
claims.explanation_en: Kuiji's gloss—‘only’ excludes external objects, ‘consciousness’ distinguishes the view from mental nihilism—sets two boundaries that keep Yogācāra between reified existence and nothingness.
claims.locator: T43, no. 1830, 卷1，p. 229a-b，序释“唯识”名义段
claims.excerpt_text: 唯遮境有，識簡心空。
claims.attribution_note: 该短句见窥基唯识注疏系统，规范命题按其上下文解释“遮”与“简”，不把“唯识”误写成经验世界不存在。

claims.text_zh: 禅以无念为宗、无作为本：无念不是昏昧断念，而是在见闻觉知中不被念头黏着；真空之体因此能够显出妙有之用。
claims.text_en: Chan takes no-thought as its principle and nonfabrication as its basis: no-thought is not blank suppression but awareness unstuck from thoughts amid seeing and knowing, so the body of true emptiness can function as wondrous presence.
claims.explanation_zh: 《显宗记》用体用语言把般若空与觉知活动连接起来，反对把修行理解为造作一个新的清净状态。
claims.explanation_en: The Record Manifesting the Lineage links prajñā emptiness to active awareness through essence-function language and rejects practice as fabrication of a new pure state.
claims.locator: 《景德傳燈錄》卷三十所收〈顯宗記〉开篇
claims.excerpt_text: 無念為宗，無作為本，真空為體，妙有為用。
claims.attribution_note: 《显宗记》传统归神会，但现存定型文本收入北宋《景德传灯录》，与敦煌神会语录的关系仍需文献分层；因此标为后出归名材料，不声称逐字出自神会。

claims.text_zh: 众人应信自己的心就是佛心，不必向心外寻找佛；但“即心是佛”是引导觉悟的方便，不应再把日常分别心实体化为佛。
claims.text_en: People should trust that their own mind is Buddha-mind and cease seeking Buddha outside it; yet “this mind is Buddha” is an expedient for awakening, not a license to reify ordinary discriminating mind as Buddha.
claims.explanation_zh: 马祖语录把佛性落实到现前心，又以“非心非佛”等转语破除对口号的执著，形成洪州禅的动态教学。
claims.explanation_en: Mazu's recorded teaching locates Buddha-nature in present mind and then uses reversals such as “neither mind nor Buddha” to break attachment to the formula, producing a dynamic Hongzhou pedagogy.
claims.locator: T51, no. 2076, 卷6〈江西道一禪師〉“各信自心是佛”段
claims.excerpt_text: 汝等諸人，各信自心是佛，此心即是佛心。
claims.work_title: 景德傳燈錄·江西道一禪師
claims.attribution_note: 现存《景德传灯录》成书于1004年，晚于马祖两百余年；该命题是宋代灯录所保存的马祖传统，不可当作同时代速记。与较早《祖堂集》可作后续复核。

claims.text_zh: 仁是广泛地爱人，义是使行动各得其宜；沿着仁义实践而行才叫道，内在具足而不依赖外物才叫德。
claims.text_en: Humaneness is broad love, rightness is making action fitting, the Way is the course traveled through humaneness and rightness, and virtue is their inward sufficiency without dependence on externals.
claims.explanation_zh: 韩愈把道德概念定义成连续的实践结构，以此反对把“道”理解成脱离人伦日用的佛老超越本体。
claims.explanation_en: Han Yu defines moral terms as a continuous structure of practice, opposing Buddhist and Daoist accounts that, in his view, detach the Way from ordinary human relations.
claims.locator: 〈原道〉开篇定义段
claims.excerpt_text: 博愛之謂仁，行而宜之之謂義，由是而之焉之謂道，足乎己無待於外之謂德。
claims.attribution_note: 《原道》归属无重大争议；规范命题保留韩愈四概念的递进关系，不单摘“博爱”作现代普遍主义口号。

claims.text_zh: 人成圣的根据是本来清明而善的性，遮蔽此性的则是情欲活动；修养不是制造新性，而是使情不再昏蔽并恢复本性。
claims.text_en: The ground of sagehood is an originally clear and good nature, while affective desires obscure it; cultivation does not manufacture a new nature but prevents emotions from darkening it and restores nature to manifestation.
claims.explanation_zh: 李翱以“性—情”结构重写儒家诚明之学，并吸收佛教止观语言，成为宋代理学心性论的重要先声。
claims.explanation_en: Li Ao restructures Confucian sincerity and illumination through nature and emotion, drawing on Buddhist contemplative language and anticipating Song learning on human nature.
claims.locator: 《復性書》上篇开篇问答
claims.excerpt_text: 人之所以為聖人者，性也；人之所以惑其性者，情也。喜怒哀懼愛惡欲七者，皆情之所為也。
claims.attribution_note: 《复性书》传世于《李文公集》。规范命题不把李翱的“情”简单等同全部情感邪恶，而按其“情能蔽性、可制而复性”的论证表述。

claims.text_zh: 分封制度不是圣人依先验蓝图创造的，而是早期社会争夺、结群和权力层级逐步形成的历史情势产物；制度应按后果和时势评价。
claims.text_en: Feudal enfeoffment was not created from a sage's prior blueprint but emerged historically from conflict, group formation, and layered authority; institutions should therefore be judged by consequences and changing circumstances.
claims.explanation_zh: 柳宗元以“势”解释封建形成，削弱把三代制度神圣化的复古论证，并据历史效果支持郡县制。
claims.explanation_en: Liu Zongyuan explains enfeoffment through historical configuration, undermining appeals that sacralize ancient institutions and supporting commanderies and counties through historical consequences.
claims.locator: 〈封建論〉首段“有里胥而后有县大夫”历史生成论证结句
claims.excerpt_text: 彼封建者，更古聖王堯舜、禹湯、文武而莫能去之……故封建非聖人意也，勢也。
claims.attribution_note: 《封建论》归属无重大争议。此处“封建”指封邦建国制度，不应用近现代“封建社会”概念替换。
